title: sideritis incana var. spinulosa
intro: Sideritis incana var. spinulosa, also known as Greek mountain tea or ironwort, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana var. spinulosa include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Sideritis incana var. spinulosa can be found in teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
